In 2 Corinthians 9:15 we find the words, "Thanks be unto God for his unspeakable gift." Elder Bruce R. Mc Conkie of the Quorum of the Twelve explained that this unspeakable gift is "the gift of the Holy Ghost in this life, and eternal life in the world to come; one is the greatest gift obtainable in mortality, the other in immortality" (Doctrinal New Testament Commentary, 3 vols., Salt Lake City:…
